positive: A symmetrical, central composition featuring an ornate celestial compass integrated with blooming bioluminescent flora. The style is hyper-detailed neo-art nouveau mixed with cosmic vaporwave aesthetics. Dominant colors are deep sapphire blues, vibrant amethyst purples, glowing teal, and metallic gold accents. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast between dark background voids and glowing elements. The overall mood is mysterious, magical, and elegant. Must be rendered as a seamless, complex graphic suitable for all-over apparel printing, maximizing pattern potential and visual impact. Studio quality, ultra high definition digital painting, volumetric lighting, cinematic aspect ratio.
negative: blurry, grain, noise, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, amateur, dirty, muted colors, jpeg artifacts, messy, cartoon, realistic photo
